mapper.sql: b.id, b.model_id, b.protocol, b.api_path, b.request_adapter, b.usage_extractor, b.stream_usage_extractor, b.status, b.remark, m.model_code, m.name AS model_name, m.provider_id
mapper.select: select from model_api_bindings b inner join models m on b.model_id = m.id where b.id = #{id}
select from model_api_bindings b inner join models m on b.model_id = m.id where b.model_id = #{modelId} order by b.id asc
mapper.insert: insert into model_api_bindings(model_id, protocol, api_path, request_adapter, usage_extractor, stream_usage_extractor, status, remark) values(#{modelId}, #{protocol}, #{apiPath}, #{requestAdapter}, #{usageExtractor}, #{streamUsageExtractor}, #{status}, #{remark})
mapper.update: update model_api_bindings set protocol = #{protocol}, api_path = #{apiPath}, request_adapter = #{requestAdapter}, usage_extractor = #{usageExtractor}, stream_usage_extractor = #{streamUsageExtractor}, status = #{status}, remark = #{remark} where id = #{id}
